programme.title: CityNews Tonight Toronto
programme.desc: Coverage of the day's top news stories.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Ivy brings his son to Moreno Valley, where good things always happen, and leaves with yo-yo's of an unexpected kind; Rene and Casey discover that their shoes are more "air" and less "Jordan.".

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.sub-title: A Plane Flew Over the Cuckoo's Nest
programme.desc: The gang is on final approach in Riverside; Darrell listens to his sports sense, and it pays off; Ivy and Ivy get distracted by a decoy but manage to find the bills in the end; Brandi tries to teach Danielle a lesson about the true meaning of trash.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.sub-title: Game of Groans: Whittier Is Coming
programme.desc: Kenny tries to reclaim the title of King of Whittier but has trouble amassing any shillings; Ivy & Ivy brave the cold to find their fortunes; Lisa finally graduates to full-fledged buyer, finding an unlikely mentor along the way.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A hired gunman defies a western outlaw's warning that if he ever came near his grave he'd reach up and snatch away his life.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A down-at-the heels ventriloquist is the victim of both his gangster-like dummy and a strangely evil little girl.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: When Charlie's estranged brother is accused of the death of his recent boxing opponent, Charlie and the team wrestle with the possibility of his guilt.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: When Superintendent Donovan transports an inmate, who happens to be his former partner, he finds himself confronting the past and caught up in a daring and dangerous escape.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: Charlie gets a break in a long-unsolved kidnapping case that has haunted him, but runs into trouble when the abductee refuses his help.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Family Feud
programme.desc: Steve Harvey assumes the hosting duties for this daytime game show in which five members of one family are pitted against five members of another family. Each team's goal is to guess the results of audience survey questions. A player from each team initially faces off, answering the question to earn the chance to either pass or play. The winning family gets a chance to earn extra cash in a bonus round.

programme.desc: Coverage of the day's top news stories.

programme.title: Breakfast Television
programme.desc: We're celebrating Volunteer Recognition Day on BT! Watch our hosts volunteer at various locations across the GTA. We're spotlighting inspiring volunteers all morning long.

programme.title: Tribunal Justice
programme.desc: An off-roading enthusiast takes his Chevy Bronco in for repairs and soon finds out that he is not a priority for the mechanic; after a year of text message excuses, he takes action and seeks justice.

programme.title: Tribunal Justice
programme.desc: An entrepreneur hires a former client to create her company's website, but when no website materializes, she sues for damages; the Judges applaud her innovative business concept.

programme.title: Judy Justice
programme.sub-title: COVID and College Coeds; Car Vandalism and Jealousy
programme.desc: A college student says illegal drug use and the risk of COVID forced her to move out of an apartment early; her roommate's father sues her for allegedly breaking the lease; a woman is accused of vandalizing a vehicle with her bare hands.

programme.title: Judy Justice
programme.desc: Repeated fisticuffs, vandalism and police intervention leave the Judge with no other choice than to advise a family to set boundaries with restraining orders.
